changes.description: Airdrop: name/claimFeeBps → constant, owner → immutable (SLOAD → bytecode constant).
Hoist totalAllocated and per-recipient reads out of loops (one SLOAD/SSTORE instead of per-iteration).
setAllocations array params memory → calldata (skips ABI-decode copy).
public → external on functions never called internally.
Cache array length + unchecked {++i}; ++i over i++; drop zero-init.

message: Optimized with Claude into optimized/ (Level 1 — fast pass, Foundry verification skipped). Originals under src/ are unchanged.
